sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (startdate DateTime, enddate DateTime);
SELECT age('day', startdate, enddate) AS day_difference FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET enddate = toDateTime('2021-01-03 12:00:00') WHERE startdate = toDateTime('2021-01-01 10:00:00');
SELECT age('month', startdate, enddate) AS month_difference FROM test_dates WHERE enddate > startdate;
